items.requirement: Legal person registration (CNES, RLP, CNPJ, operational permit from ANVISA/SES)
items.description: Documentation proving lab's legal registration and authorization to operate
items.evidence: Upload folder: /labSettings/legal-docs/
items.frequency: Annual review
items.notes: Required before audit start

items.requirement: Quality Director formal designation (CREA/CRMV, authority document, substitutes listed)
items.description: Formal appointment of QD with defined scope; minimum 1 substitute named
items.evidence: Module: labSettings/governance/director-designation.json + Drive doc
items.frequency: Annual review; update if personnel changes
items.notes: Substitutes must have equivalent CREA/CRMV

items.requirement: Mission, Vision, Values (norteadores) document published lab-wide
items.description: Formal statement of lab's strategic direction; ethical principles; anti-corruption policy
items.evidence: SGD: /sgq/quality-documents/norteadores/ + staff awareness certification (educacao-continuada)
items.frequency: Annual review; biennial revision if major strategic change
items.notes: Include ethics code + whistleblower hotline contact

items.requirement: Quality Policy (formal statement, executive endorsement, lab-wide dissemination)
items.description: ISO 15189-compliant quality policy; signed by top mgmt; available to all staff; posted in common areas
items.evidence: SGD doc + educacao-continuada staff training record + physical posters in lab areas
items.frequency: Triennial review; annual content audit
items.notes: Must address pre-, analytical, post-analytical; competency; continual improvement

items.requirement: Quality planning & strategic objectives (3–5 year plan with KPI targets)
items.description: Formal strategic plan aligned with quality policy; measurable objectives; assigned owners
items.evidence: SGD doc + KPI dashboard (kpis module) linked to plan
items.frequency: Annual review & update
items.notes: Include: turnaround time, error rate, customer satisfaction, staff turnover

items.requirement: Organizational chart with current names, titles, reporting lines, and responsibility matrix
items.description: Visual hierarchy showing all positions; CREA/CRMV #; lines of authority; cross-functional accountability
items.evidence: Drive diagram + SGD version-controlled copy + staff list in labSettings/personnel
items.frequency: Quarterly update (or immediately upon hire/termination)
items.notes: Update within 5 working days of personnel changes

items.requirement: Management Review cycle established & scheduled (minimum 2× per year; recommend quarterly)
items.description: Formal quarterly or semi-annual meeting chaired by QD; documents 15 DICQ input areas
items.evidence: SGD: /sgq/management-review/ calendar + minutes template + attendance records
items.frequency: Quarterly execution; annual plan review
items.notes: Mandatory inputs: CAPA status, audit findings, NC, customer complaints, KPIs, training, resource needs, regulatory changes

items.requirement: Internal Audit Schedule (annual plan covering all DICQ blocks A–J, at least 2 audits/year per module)
items.description: Master audit plan published in SGD; audits scheduled 30+ days in advance; frequency per risk
items.evidence: SGD: /auditoria/audit-plan.xlsx + calendar in labSettings/audit
items.frequency: Annual plan review; quarterly schedule adjustment
items.notes: Include risk-based frequency (high-risk modules: 2×/yr; low-risk: 1×/yr)

items.requirement: Internal audit execution (audit reports with findings, root cause, corrective actions, follow-up)
items.description: Formal audit records; evidence-based findings; CAPA linked; follow-up schedule defined
items.evidence: Module: auditoria/audit-reports/ + CAPA module cross-reference
items.frequency: As per schedule (monthly or quarterly)
items.notes: Auditor(s) independent from auditee; training on audit standards required

items.requirement: Risk Management process (FMEA or risk matrix; annual review; mitigation actions assigned)
items.description: Formal risk identification, assessment (probability × severity), mitigation, and monitoring
items.evidence: Module: risks/risk-register.xlsx + mitigation action tracking in CAPA module
items.frequency: Annual re-assessment; quarterly review of high-risk items
items.notes: Include pre-, analytical, post-analytical and operational risks; tie to DICQ blocks

items.requirement: Non-Conformance (NC) register with root cause and corrective/preventive action (CAPA)
items.description: Log of defects, errors, complaints; systematic investigation; assigned owner; deadline for closure
items.evidence: Module: capa/non-conformances/ + educacao-continuada follow-up training
items.frequency: Real-time entry; monthly trend analysis
items.notes: CAPA closure verified by QD; trend analysis triggers preventive actions

items.requirement: Corrective & Preventive Action (CAPA) closure with effectiveness verification
items.description: CAPA implemented, verified effective, and closed; follow-up audit or re-test confirms result
items.evidence: Module: capa/closure-verification/ + audit trail with timestamps
items.frequency: Per CAPA target date (typically 30–90 days from NC)
items.notes: Overdue CAPA is a critical audit finding; escalate to management review

items.requirement: Performance Indicators (KPIs) dashboard monitoring turnaround, errors, conformance, customer satisfaction
items.description: Real-time or daily KPI tracking; targets defined; trends reviewed in management review
items.evidence: Module: kpis/dashboard/ + monthly export to management review
items.frequency: Daily update; monthly trend analysis; annual goal reset
items.notes: Minimum KPIs: TAT, error rate, retest %, rework %, NC origin (internal/external)

items.requirement: Document Control procedures (versioning, approval, distribution, obsolete control) active in SGD
items.description: Formal workflow: draft → technical review → QD approval → distribution → versioning → obsolete seal
items.evidence: Module: sgd/ audit workflow; approval_log table; distribution_records
items.frequency: Continuous; audit trail maintained per RDC 978 5.3
items.notes: All regulatory and procedural docs require written approval; e-signature acceptable (per RDC 978 Art. 88)

items.requirement: Supplier Quality Management (assessment, re-audit, purchasing controls, SLA monitoring)
items.description: Approved supplier list; annual performance review; delivery & quality tracking; escalation process
items.evidence: Module: fornecedores/ supplier-performance.xlsx + SLA audit trail
items.frequency: Annual re-assessment; quarterly performance review; real-time SLA tracking
items.notes: Include reagent suppliers, calibration labs, lab support (RDC blocker); RDC 978 Art. 36–39 compliance

items.requirement: Equipment Maintenance & Calibration schedule (preventive & corrective; records retained 5 years)
items.description: Master maintenance plan; calibration certs; downtime log; maintenance effectiveness audit
items.evidence: Module: equipamentos/ maintenance_schedule + calibration_certificates folder in Drive
items.frequency: Per manufacturer spec; annual review for adequacy
items.notes: Include critical analyzers, pipettes, centrifuges, balances; service contracts required for all critical equipment

items.requirement: Complaint investigation & resolution (formal logging, root cause, closure notification to customer)
items.description: Customer complaint workflow; systematic analysis; corrective action; response SLA ≤15 days
items.evidence: Module: complaints/ linked to CAPA; email confirmation to customer
items.frequency: Real-time logging; weekly trend review
items.notes: Complaints may trigger NC and CAPA; escalate to management review if trend detected

items.requirement: Collection SOP (patient ID, collection tube, volume, timing, special handling, rejection criteria)
items.description: Formal procedure document; training for phlebotomists; competency assessment; annual refresher
items.evidence: SGD: /pops/collection-sop/ + staff training record (educacao-continuada)
items.frequency: Triennial review; immediate update if equipment/reagent changes
items.notes: Include diagram of correct order of draw; tube specifications; special conditions (fasting, posture)

items.requirement: Transport & Storage SOP (temperature, timing, handling, transport containers, rejection criteria)
items.description: Formal procedure for specimen transport from collection site to lab; temperature monitoring; chain of custody
items.evidence: SGD: /pops/transport-sop/ + temperature log (controle-temperatura module)
items.frequency: Triennial review; annual temperature audit
items.notes: Include: ambient vs. refrigerated; courier training; contingency for transport delays

items.requirement: Sample Reception & Rejection procedure (visual inspection, labeling, rejection log, physician notification)
items.description: Formal checklist for specimen acceptance/rejection; criteria defined; rejection logged and communicated
items.evidence: SGD: /pops/reception-sop/ + rejection_log module + audit trail
items.frequency: Triennial review; monthly audit of rejection decisions
items.notes: Rejection criteria: hemolysis, clotting, insufficient volume, contamination, labeling mismatch, delayed arrival

items.requirement: Patient ID verification and specimen labeling (barcode, two-identifier rule, legibility, traceability)
items.description: Two-step verification at collection and at lab reception; barcode on specimen; electronic link to order
items.evidence: Module: specimens/ barcode audit trail + mislabel incident log
items.frequency: Real-time; monthly mislabel rate audit
items.notes: Target: zero mislabels; any incident triggers root cause analysis

items.requirement: Collection site standards (environment, supplies, training, competency, hygiene, waste management)
items.description: If external sites, formal agreement with collection partner; audit schedule; SOP implementation verification
items.evidence: Module: lab-apoio/ collection-site-audit.xlsx + agreement scan in SGD
items.frequency: Annual site audit; quarterly checklist verification
items.notes: Applicable only if external collection points; include mobile collection teams if present

items.requirement: Staff Training matrix (roles, competencies, training dates, refresher schedule, competency verification)
items.description: Master training list for all staff; mapped to job roles; annual competency assessment; training effectiveness audit
items.evidence: Module: educacao-continuada/training-matrix + competency_assessment scores + retraining log
items.frequency: Quarterly update; annual competency re-assessment
items.notes: Minimum: SOPs, quality policy, safety, LGPD, incident response; new staff within 30 days of hire

items.requirement: Operational Procedures (POPs) for all critical processes (SOPs, WI, FR, POL) versioned and approved
items.description: All operational docs in SGD with version, approval date, effective date, and obsolescence control
items.evidence: Module: sgd/ POP register; audit trail per RDC 978 5.3; Drive folder structure: MQ → PQ → IT → FR → POL
items.frequency: Triennial review; immediate update if process changes
items.notes: Minimum: 40+ POPs covering pre-, analytical, post-, equipment, safety, training, audit, document control

items.requirement: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity plan (tested annually, documented, accessible to all staff)
items.description: Formal plan; backup procedures; recovery time objectives (RTO); recovery point objectives (RPO); annual drill
items.evidence: SGD: /business-continuity/dr-plan.docx + test log + staff awareness certificate
items.frequency: Annual test; triennial plan review
items.notes: Include: backup data, equipment, staff, communication protocol, escalation, recovery procedures

items.requirement: Cybersecurity & Data Protection policy (passwords, access controls, encryption, incident response, LGPD)
items.description: Formal policy; annual audit; staff training; incident log; alignment with LGPD and RDC 978 requirements
items.evidence: SGD: /cybersecurity-policy/ + LGPD DPIA (Data Protection Impact Assessment) + audit trail
items.frequency: Annual policy review; quarterly access audit; annual penetration test
items.notes: LGPD Requirement: formal DPIA for clinical data; privacy impact assessment; data minimization principle

items.requirement: Quality Manual (comprehensive ISO 15189-compliant doc; 20+ sections; approved by QD; published to staff)
items.description: Master document covering lab mission, organization, roles, processes, quality system; biennial review
items.evidence: SGD: /quality-manual/ (master copy) + version history + distribution list + read confirmation log
items.frequency: Biennial major review; annual content audit
items.notes: 20 DICQ-required sections: governance, organization, personnel, quality planning, processes, analytics, reporting, complaints, audits, management review, document control, non-conformance, risk, training, equipment, environment, safety, LGPD, DR, outsourcing

items.requirement: Annual Compliance Audit (self-audit against DICQ, RDC 978, ISO 15189; report to management review)
items.description: Formal annual self-assessment; checklist of 115+ compliance items; findings reported to management; gap closure plan
items.evidence: Module: auditoria/annual-compliance-audit/ + scoring matrix + management review minutes
items.frequency: Annual execution; quarterly trend review
items.notes: Template available: COMPLIANCE_AUDIT_INDEX.md + AUDITOR_EVIDENCE_CHECKLIST.md in docs/

items.requirement: Regulatory Affairs & Change Management (notification of equipment/method changes, regulatory tracking)
items.description: Process for RDC/ANVISA regulatory tracking; change log; impact assessment; staff notification; documentation
items.evidence: Module: labSettings/regulatory-changes/ + change-log audit trail
items.frequency: Quarterly regulatory scan; real-time change documentation
items.notes: Include: RDC 978, RDC 786, LGPD, ISO 15189 updates; notify staff within 5 days of publication

items.requirement: Customer Communication & Feedback mechanism (complaints, suggestions, quality feedback channel)
items.description: Formal channel for customer feedback; response procedure; escalation to management review; trend analysis
items.evidence: Module: complaints/ + email/phone log + response documentation
items.frequency: Real-time logging; monthly trend review
items.notes: Include: phone, email, web form; response SLA ≤15 days; escalate complaints to QD if critical

items.requirement: Proficiency Testing (CEQ — Controle Externo de Qualidade) annual participation and result documentation
items.description: Enrollment in external quality assurance program; quarterly testing rounds; z-score tracking; failure investigation
items.evidence: Module: ceq/ (Controle Externo de Qualidade) result tracking + z-score report + corrective action log
items.frequency: Per program schedule (typically quarterly); annual result review
items.notes: Minimum: 2 CEQ programs (e.g., Reanalitica, CMAC); acceptable z-score ±2.0 (±3.0 maximum)

items.requirement: Biosecurity & Environmental Monitoring (temperature, humidity, microbial air, biosafety levels, waste management)
items.description: Environmental controls; monitoring logs; corrective action triggers; waste disposal certification; annual compliance audit
items.evidence: Module: biosseguranca/ (biosecurity) + environment monitoring logs + PGRSS (waste management) documentation
items.frequency: Daily temperature monitoring; monthly microbial air test; annual biosafety audit
items.notes: RDC 222/2018: segregate biological waste; contractor certification; tracking of disposal; audit trail

overdue.trigger: completion_date is null AND due_date < today - 30 days

at_risk.trigger: completion_date is null AND due_date < today + 7 days

export_formats.pdf_report: Generate compliance summary with bar charts by DICQ block; print-friendly; includes owner contact info
export_formats.excel_tracker: Editable spreadsheet with sortable columns; auto-calculates completion %; color-coded alerts
export_formats.management_review_input: Formatted table for Q/MR minutes; status summary; overdue items flagged

integration_points.educacao_continuada: Staff training records linked to G-001 (training matrix); competency scores auto-populate
integration_points.sgd: Document links for all A-*, D-007, G-002, G-005; version control audit trail
integration_points.auditoria: Internal audit reports linked to D-001, D-002; findings auto-create CAPA in next section
integration_points.capa: Non-conformances and corrective actions auto-link from D-004, D-005, and audit findings
integration_points.kpis: KPI dashboard auto-feeds management review input (G-006 annual audit + 4.15 MR inputs)
integration_points.labSettings: governance, legal-docs, personnel, audit calendar auto-populate owner fields from directory
integration_points.complaints: Customer complaints auto-link to D-010; trend analysis triggers preventive actions

success_criteria.phase_9_gate: A-001 through A-007, D-001 through D-010, E-001 through E-005 ≥80% complete by 2026-08-31
success_criteria.audit_readiness: All items ≥90% complete by 2026-09-30; overdue count = 0; annual compliance audit ≥88% (DICQ conformance)
success_criteria.governance_maturity: Management review cycle active (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4); minutes document 15 DICQ inputs; CAPA closure rate ≥95%
